servers.name: GitHub
servers.description: Access repositories, issues, and code search
servers.setupInstructions:
1. Create a GitHub OAuth App at https://github.com/settings/developers
2. Set Authorization callback URL to: {PUBLIC_URL}/mcp/oauth/callback
3. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
4. Update .termos/mcp.config.json with your Client ID
5. Add GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET to your .env file

servers.name: Figma
servers.setupInstructions:
1. Create a Figma App at https://www.figma.com/developers/apps
2. Set Redirect URI to: {PUBLIC_URL}/mcp/oauth/callback
3. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
4. Update .termos/mcp.config.json with your Client ID
5. Add FIGMA_CLIENT_SECRET to your .env file

servers.name: Notion
servers.description: Access and manage Notion pages and databases
servers.setupInstructions:
1. Create a Notion Integration at https://www.notion.so/my-integrations
2. Set Redirect URI to: {PUBLIC_URL}/mcp/oauth/callback
3. Copy the OAuth Client ID and Secret
4. Update .termos/mcp.config.json with your Client ID
5. Add NOTION_CLIENT_SECRET to your .env file

servers.name: Firecrawl
servers.setupInstructions:
1. Get API key from https://www.firecrawl.dev/dashboard
2. Add FIRECRAWL_API_KEY to your .env file

servers.name: Grafana
servers.setupInstructions:
1. Create a Service Account in your Grafana instance
2. Generate an API token
3. Add GRAFANA_URL and GRAFANA_API_KEY to your .env file

servers.name: Atlassian Jira
servers.setupInstructions:
1. Create an OAuth 2.0 app at https://developer.atlassian.com/console/myapps/
2. Set Callback URL to: {PUBLIC_URL}/mcp/oauth/callback
3. Copy the Client ID and Secret
4. Update .termos/mcp.config.json with your Client ID
5. Add JIRA_CLIENT_SECRET to your .env file

servers.name: Datadog
servers.setupInstructions:
1. Go to https://app.datadoghq.com/organization-settings/api-keys
2. Create an API Key and Application Key
3. Add DATADOG_API_KEY and DATADOG_APP_KEY to your .env file

servers.name: Google Calendar
servers.setupInstructions:
1. Create OAuth credentials at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials
2. Set Authorized redirect URI to: {PUBLIC_URL}/mcp/oauth/callback
3. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
4. Update .termos/mcp.config.json with your Client ID
5. Add GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET to your .env file

servers.name: Sentry
servers.description: Access error tracking and performance monitoring

servers.name: Linear
servers.setupInstructions:
1. Create OAuth app at https://linear.app/settings/api
2. Set Redirect URL to: {PUBLIC_URL}/mcp/oauth/callback
3. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
4. Update .termos/mcp.config.json with your Client ID
5. Add LINEAR_CLIENT_SECRET to your .env file

servers.name: Discord
servers.setupInstructions:
1. Create Discord app at https://discord.com/developers/applications
2. Set Redirect URL to: {PUBLIC_URL}/mcp/oauth/callback
3. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
4. Update .termos/mcp.config.json with your Client ID
5. Add DISCORD_CLIENT_SECRET to your .env file

servers.name: GitLab
servers.setupInstructions:
1. Create GitLab application at https://gitlab.com/-/profile/applications
2. Set Redirect URI to: {PUBLIC_URL}/mcp/oauth/callback
3. Copy the Application ID and Secret
4. Update .termos/mcp.config.json with your Client ID
5. Add GITLAB_CLIENT_SECRET to your .env file
